an5.98:1.1: “Endowed with five qualities, a monk pursuing mindfulness of breathing will in no long time penetrate the Unprovoked (release).
an5.98:1.3: “He is a person who imposes only a little (on others): one of few duties & projects, easy to support, easily contented with the requisites of life.
an5.98:1.4: “He is a person who eats only a little food, committed to not indulging his stomach.
an5.98:1.5: “He is a person of only a little sloth, committed to wakefulness.
an5.98:1.6: “He lives in the wilderness, in an isolated dwelling place.
an5.98:1.7: “He reflects on the mind as it is released.
an5.98:1.8: “Endowed with these five qualities, a monk pursuing mindfulness of breathing will in no long time penetrate the Unprovoked.”
